chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.S-318 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For hearing of main case 20-11-2025 Petitioner is called absent. M/s Saeed Ahmed Wassan, Assistant A.G and Khalil Ahmed Maitlo, Deputy P.G for the State a/w SIP Ghulam Asghar on behalf of SSP, Khairpur and SIP Allahando of P.S, Piryaloi. Respondents No.5 to 7 are present. **** Petitioner is called absent, no intimation is received. Learned Law Officers file statement on behalf of official respondents No.2,3 and SHO, P.S, Piryaloi, taken on record. Private respondents No.6&7 also file objections, taken on record. Since the petitioner is called absent, it appears that he is not interested in proceeding with the matter. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE Ahmad
